# Sahara Tyre – LLMs.txt

> Sahara Tyre GIDC Vapi is Vapi's most trusted tyre specialist and automotive workshop since 2005, located in Vapi GIDC, Gujarat, India. We offer new, used & remolded tyres, puncture repair, wheel alignment, tyre balancing, brake inspection, suspension check, truck tyre fitting, fleet maintenance, and roadside assistance.

## About

Sahara Tyre GIDC Vapi has been serving Vapi GIDC and surrounding areas for over 18 years. We are a full-service automotive workshop and tyre shop offering sales, fitting, repair, inspection, and maintenance for passenger cars, commercial trucks, and industrial vehicles.

**Website:** https://sahara-tyre.vercel.app/
**Phone:** +91-9377158216
**WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/919377158216
**Email:** shaikh.samir.dev@gmail.com
**Location:** Shop No 07, Amidhara Complex, Char Rasta, near CNG Pump, Phase 1, GIDC, Vapi, Gujarat 396195, India
**Coordinates:** 20.362324°N, 72.919686°E
**Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 7:30 AM – 9:00 PM | Sunday, 7:30 AM – 6:00 PM

## Services

| Service | Description |
|---|---|
| **New Tyre Sales** | All major brands (MRF, CEAT, Apollo, Bridgestone, etc.) for cars, SUVs, vans, and trucks |
| **Used Tyres** | Quality-checked pre-owned tyres with satisfaction warranty |
| **Remolded Tyres** | Eco-friendly remolded tyres inspected for safety, with satisfaction warranty |
| **Puncture Repair** | Quick nail puncture and tubeless tyre repair (typically 15–20 min) |
| **Wheel Alignment** | Precision laser wheel alignment for all vehicle types |
| **Tyre Balancing** | Computerised tyre balancing to eliminate vibrations |
| **Brake Inspection** | Pad and rotor inspection for disc and drum brakes |
| **Suspension Check** | Strut, shock absorber, and steering component inspection |
| **Truck Tyre Fitting** | Heavy-duty commercial tyre fitting for GIDC fleet vehicles |
| **Tyre Exchange** | Get fair value for your old tyres toward new purchases |
| **Fleet Maintenance** | Scheduled tyre rotation, alignment, and inspection for GIDC fleets |
| **Vehicle Inspection** | Complete wheel, steering, and suspension health check |
| **Roadside Assistance** | Emergency tyre repair and support near Vapi GIDC |
| **Tread Inspection** | Free tyre safety and tread-depth checks |

## Pricing

Prices are competitive and vary by tyre brand, size, and vehicle type. We offer:
- Transparent pricing with no hidden workshop charges
- Special rates for fleet/commercial customers
- Tyre exchange discounts
- Free basic inspections

## FAQs

**Q: How much does wheel alignment cost?**
A: Wheel alignment at Sahara Tyre Vapi is available at very affordable pricing for all vehicle types — from hatchbacks to commercial trucks. Call +91-9377158216 for a quote based on your vehicle model.

**Q: Do you stock heavy truck tyres?**
A: Yes, we specialise in heavy-duty commercial tyres for GIDC logistics and industrial needs.

**Q: How long does puncture repair take?**
A: A standard nail puncture takes 15–20 minutes. Complex sidewall repairs may take longer.

**Q: Do you offer brake inspection and suspension check?**
A: Yes, we recommend brake pad inspection and suspension check alongside every wheel alignment service for complete vehicle safety.

**Q: Can you service fleet vehicles?**
A: Yes, we offer scheduled fleet maintenance including tyre rotation, alignment, brake inspection, and priority roadside assistance for GIDC factories and logistics companies.

**Q: Are you open on Sundays?**
A: Yes, we are open 7 days a week — Monday–Saturday 7:30 AM – 9:00 PM, Sunday 7:30 AM – 6:00 PM.

**Q: Do you offer roadside assistance?**
A: Yes, we provide emergency tyre support near Vapi GIDC. Call +91-9377158216.

**Q: Do you buy old tyres?**
A: Yes, we accept used tyres for exchange or buyback — bring your old tyre when you visit our GIDC shop.

**Q: Are used tyres safe?**
A: Absolutely. Every used and remolded tyre is quality-tested for tread depth, sidewall condition, and structural safety before sale. Covered by a satisfaction warranty.

**Q: Do I need an appointment?**
A: No appointment needed — walk-ins welcome, open 7 days a week.

**Q: Is parking available?**
A: Yes, free on-site parking at our GIDC Phase 1 location near the CNG pump.

**Q: Do you serve areas outside Vapi city?**
A: Yes, we serve Gunjan, Chanod Gate, Imran Nagar, Chala, Salvav, Daman Road, Daman, Silvassa and nearby areas.

**Q: What payment methods do you accept?**
A: Cash, Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, and all major UPI apps.
